recentTweets.text:
Thank you, Mr. President.

Wisconsinites are tired of paying the price for Canada's lack of proper forest management.

It's time for them to live up to their agreements.

The American people demand that we have secure elections and the SAVE America Act will deliver just that.

It's time for the Senate to get the job done and send it to President Trump's desk. https://t.co/Abxl7uXWD3

Wisconsinites shouldn't have to suffer because Canada refuses to practice responsible wildfire management.

We are calling on the EPA to address the impacts of these ongoing wildfires and ensure Canada lives up to its end of the U.S.-Canada Air Quality Agreement.

The President of the United States addressed the nation last night to discuss declassified documents showing foreign interference in our elections.

...And members of the mainstream media refused to air it.

I thought democracy dies in darkness?

It was awesome to meet with the Wisconsin FFA State Officer Team to discuss the importance of agricultural education and ensuring the next generation is prepared to continue feeding America.

The future of American agriculture looks very bright. https://t.co/m0n110dBW5

This is no longer the fringe of the Democratic Party. It's becoming the mainstream.

When they scream about "threats to democracy," they don't need to look any further than their own party.
Congratulations to the Kaukauna High School Galloping Ghosts baseball team on winning the WIAA Division 1 State Baseball Championship for the first time since 1953. https://t.co/TzAGPmQ0Zk

Once again, the House has done its job. Now the Senate needs to do theirs.

The American people deserve election integrity.

It was great to welcome the Verhasselt brothers, two of our outstanding dairy farmers from Kaukauna, along with U.S. Venture, to our office in Washington, D.C. 

We had a great discussion about the opportunities and innovations dairy digesters bring to farmers and communities https://t.co/yLmWlljvLU

The SAVE America Act would make you:

1. Prove you're a U.S. Citizen to register to vote.
2. Show ID to prove you are who you say you are. 

Democrats are saying the quiet part out loud. They know they can't win on their own merit.

Elmer Ragen's life is a testament to public service. From serving our country in uniform to serving Northeast Wisconsin as a volunteer, veteran advocate, and local elected official, his legacy will never be forgotten.

My prayers are with his family during this difficult time. https://t.co/zrOjyvLiql

You have to be a citizen to vote in American elections.

No amount of fear mongering will change the fact that 84% of Americans support commonsense voter ID.

I enjoyed touring Ornua Ingredients in Hilbert and having the chance to meet with so many of their awesome team members, including the company’s President, Ryan Toreson.

It was great to witness firsthand the hard work taking place at their manufacturing facility and to have the https://t.co/Y4Yr0uQDIR
It was great to welcome @VP to Wisconsin to discuss our efforts to root out waste, fraud, and abuse in our government and put American taxpayers first. https://t.co/lDvhhA9PYs

Fraud is theft from the American people. Plain and simple.

Republicans will not stand by and let fraudsters steal Americans' hard-earned tax dollars. https://t.co/Za2qXfAj5B

I am saddened to learn of the passing of Waukesha County Executive Paul Farrow. Paul dedicated many years to serving our state, leaving behind a lasting legacy of public service.

My prayers are with his family during this difficult time.

Judge Dugan used her position to help an illegal alien evade federal law enforcement and is essentially being told it was okay because she was "upset" about immigration enforcement. 

Insanity. What happened to "no one is above the law"?

It was great to attend the groundbreaking for the new Kaukauna Utilities water treatment plant this morning.

I’m proud to have secured $1 million for this project through the FY2026 Community Project Funding process, and I’m excited to see construction get underway. https://t.co/HENo963u5r

For 250 years, America has stood as the world's greatest force for freedom and opportunity.

We're blessed to call this country home.

Happy Fourth of July! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/jyBckLToZu

🚨 If you were impacted by the storms and flooding in April, you can use the link below to apply for FEMA Individual Assistance:
https://t.co/ilL3DACJXR

I led our delegation in a bipartisan letter urging the Trump Administration to approve the state's request for federal assistance. The President has done so, and Wisconsin will now receive the relief it needs.

The only person playing politics here is you, Governor.

If it came from a lab, it's not butter.

The REAL Butter Act will make sure it's labeled that way. https://t.co/Kkl5Bf7D61

I'm grateful to @POTUS for approving our state's request for disaster assistance and glad to see Northeast Wisconsin receive the relief it deserves.

I look forward to seeing these much-needed funds delivered to communities across #WI08 very soon. https://t.co/kz9X3AQYhE
As we celebrate the last day of National Dairy Month, I urge my colleagues to join me in standing with America's dairy farmers by supporting my REAL Butter Act. https://t.co/x3G0NtRirt

Our Founders certainly never intended for the children of illegal aliens to automatically become citizens.

This is the wrong decision and only incentivizes illegal immigration.

This is a huge win for women and girls across our country and a win for common sense.

Men have no place in women's sports.

This is unacceptable and it cannot become the new normal for Green Bay elections.

Green Bay residents deserve to have faith in our system, and they deserve answers as to exactly why this keeps happening. https://t.co/bQAWfcNRSo

RT @HouseSmallBiz: 🇺🇸 We're living in the GOLDEN AGE of American small business.  

WATCH: @RepTonyWied on how the entrepreneurial spirit t…
RT @mugnaini_j: Butter comes from cows, there is no substitute for the real thing. Thanks to @RepTonyWied for standing with Wisconsin dairy…

It was a pleasure to welcome this year's Congressional Art Competition winner, Scarlett Anderson, to Washington, DC this week.

Scarlett's piece, "The Lioness" showcases the best of Northeast Wisconsin's talent and creativity, and I am happy to see it hung up in the U.S.
Capitol https://t.co/Yf5R0zrsOp

This program was never intended to allow people to remain in the United States indefinitely. 

It's right there in the name: temporary.

It's common sense: only American citizens can vote in American elections.

The American people agree, and the Senate needs to pass the SAVE America Act NOW. https://t.co/qDAwI9C0BO

RT @HouseSmallBiz: Earlier this year, @POTUS signed the Investing in All of America Act into law — and its already GAME CHANGING.

MUST WAT…

I am very saddened to hear of the passing of Elmer Ragen. He was a pillar of our community and one of my inspirations for getting involved in public service. 

His service to our nation in the military, and to the people of Northeast Wisconsin as a local official will never be
TDS is a terminal illness.

Congratulations to Deputy Brent Reimer of the Kewaunee County Sheriff’s Office for receiving the Wisconsin Professional Police Association’s 2026 Certificate of Merit and thank you for your service to Northeast Wisconsin. https://t.co/ZfcpcjKO4B

The House has passed the SAVE America Act twice.

It’s time for the Senate to do their job and pass it as well.

Americans deserve secure elections, and they can’t wait any longer.
RT @SpectrumNews1WI: Earlier this week, @RepTonyWied introduced the Recognizing Engineered Alternatives As Lab-created, or REAL, Butter Act…

I had a great discussion with the U.S. Chamber, the Fox Cities Chamber, and local business leaders in Appleton.

We talked about key infrastructure projects across #WI08, my work on the T&I Committee, and the importance of getting the BUILD America 250 Act across the finish line. https://t.co/UGXxg4eBrB

Spread the news: if it comes from a lab and not a dairy cow, it doesn't get to be called butter.

America's dairy farmers work hard every day to feed our country. They shouldn't have to compete with products that hide behind misleading labels. https://t.co/3CNz3DA7kr

RT @RepTiffany: The REAL Butter Act is common sense.

Food labels should tell the truth. If it’s lab-created butter, it should be clearly l…
Thank you to @RepRileyNY for co-leading this effort and @RepTiffany, @RepVanOrden, @RepJohnRose, @RepTenney,  and @RepDavid for being original cosponsors.

Read more 👇 
https://t.co/nGpK2H23gj

🚨Billionaires like Bill Gates are trying to undercut Wisconsin farmers by funding lab-grown butter projects. 

That’s why today I introduced the REAL Butter Act to clearly label it.

Consumers deserve to know what they’re buying, and dairy farmers deserve a level playing field. https://t.co/WKJ10h9Iez
Wishing a Happy Father's Day to all the incredible dads across #WI08 – especially my dad, Jerry. https://t.co/1mbtUZlk1v

This is absolutely insane and should be a top story across every major media outlet.

Those responsible for shielding this information from the public must be held accountable.

Thank you, @SenRonJohnson, for bringing this to light. Americans have a right to know.

.@VP has proven to be an effective leader who is committed to doing the work necessary to prevent endless wars.

That's exactly the kind of leadership I respect.

After months of fearmongering and lying about the One Big Beautiful Bill, now @GovEvers is taking credit for it.

You really can’t make it up.

The fact is, Republicans worked hard to deliver this funding for Wisconsinites, and did so with zero help from Democrats.
My statement on President Trump's peace negotiations with Iran: https://t.co/p37h5tMwAY

I was incredibly honored to present a long-overdue Air Medal to Suring veteran Dennis Schuettpelz for his service in Vietnam. 

Dennis earned this recognition through meritorious achievement during combat operations, but never received the medal he deserved. Yesterday, we had the https://t.co/EWHRyEfjL8

Tomorrow, Airman Second Class Daniel “Dinny” Frederick McMann of Marinette will finally be laid to rest.

McMann gave his life in service to our nation during the Korean War when the military transport aircraft he was aboard disappeared over Alaska in 1952.

Though decades have https://t.co/AsZst8tzJQ

It was great to visit Green Valley Dairy in Krakow to tour the farm and discuss how I can continue advocating for our dairy farmers in Washington.

I was proud to support legislation like the Farm Bill and the Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act that will create new opportunities and https://t.co/OcNu9SdGHu

I had a great morning yesterday at the Breakfast on the Farm in Outagamie County.

We’re lucky to have such incredible farmers across Northeast Wisconsin that not only feed our communities, but also bring people together. https://t.co/dJWQ3IoPzv

It was great to welcome members of the Wisconsin Home Builders Association to our office in Washington, DC.

We discussed the need to continue finding ways to make housing more affordable and how legislation like the 21st Century Road to Housing Act can help make that a reality. https://t.co/pbA5nzvS9U

This week, the House voted to:

✅Fully fund ICE and CBP to keep our border secure.
✅ Prevent fraud and abuse in our government.
✅ Condemn efforts to defraud taxpayers.

Republicans are passing commonsense legislation that protects our communities and your tax dollars.

This National Dairy Month, our farmers can celebrate the benefits that the Farm Bill will deliver for Wisconsin’s dairy industry.

This bill was designed to help our farmers not only continue feeding America, but also thrive for generations to come. https://t.co/bruSe3O5Mw

When times get tough, Wisconsinites come together. We saw that firsthand following the flooding across Northeast Wisconsin this April.

I commend our local officials for their leadership and want them to know that I will continue to stand with them every step of the way. https://t.co/xelqRVIpNS

The American people want secure borders and they know who is standing with them.

While Democrats continue to fight for illegal aliens, today Republicans will vote to fully fund ICE and CBP and give them the tools they need to keep Americans safe.

82 years ago today, courageous soldiers stormed the beaches of Normandy and risked everything to defend freedom and democracy. 

We will never forget their bravery and sacrifice, which allows us to have the freedoms we enjoy today. https://t.co/oqEbBnx2cb

assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
